summary: prism-core modules that append and replay durable concept and concept-relation event streams before projections materialize them into queryable packets.
evidence: `crates/prism-core/src/lib.rs` declares `concept_events` and `concept_relation_events` as dedicated publication modules beside other core concerns.
These modules are the event-sourced write path that precedes projected concept packets and relation graphs.
risk_hint: If these streams drift, projection refresh can materialize stale or malformed concept knowledge even when reads still look plausible.
